2603.23562.title: Synthetic Mixed Training: Scaling Parametric Knowledge Acquisition Beyond RAG
2603.23562.paper_summary: Synthetic data augmentation helps language models learn new knowledge in data-constrained domains. However, naively scaling existing synthetic data methods by training on more synthetic tokens or using stronger generators yields diminishing returns below the performance of RAG. To break the RAG ceiling, we introduce Synthetic Mixed Training, which combines synthetic QAs and synthetic documents. This leverages their complementary training signals, and enables log-linear improvements as both synthetic data volume and generator strength increase. This allows the model to outperform RAG by a 2.6\% relative gain on QuaLITY, a long-document reading comprehension benchmark. In addition, we introduce Focal Rewriting, a simple technique for synthetic document generation that explicitly conditions document generation on specific questions, improving the diversity of synthetic documents and yielding a steeper log-linear scaling curve. On QuaLITY, our final recipe trains a Llama 8B model that outperforms RAG by 4.4\% relatively. Across models and benchmarks (QuaLITY, LongHealth, FinanceBench), our training enables models to beat RAG in five of six settings, outperforms by 2.6\%, and achieves a 9.1\% gain when combined with RAG.
2603.23562.paper_summary_zh: 合成數據增強幫助語言模型在數據受限的領域學習新知識。<lb/>然而，單純通過在更多合成標記上訓練或使用更強的生成器來擴展現有的合成數據方法，會導致收益遞減，低於RAG的性能。<lb/>為了突破RAG的天花板，我們引入了合成混合訓練，該方法結合了合成問答和合成文檔。<lb/>這利用了它們互補的訓練信號，並隨著合成數據量和生成器強度的增加，實現了對數線性改進。<lb/>這使得模型在QuaLITY這一長文檔閱讀理解基準上相對超越RAG 2.6%。<lb/>此外，我們引入了焦點重寫，這是一種簡單的合成文檔生成技術，明確地將文檔生成條件化於特定問題，從而提高合成文檔的多樣性並產生更陡的對數線性擴展曲線。<lb/>在QuaLITY上，我們的最終配方訓練了一個Llama 8B模型，相對超越RAG 4.4%。<lb/>在各模型和基準（QuaLITY、LongHealth、FinanceBench）上，我們的訓練使模型在六種設置中的五種超越RAG，超出2.6%，並在與RAG結合時實現9.1%的增益。
2603.23562.author: Seungju Han et.al.
2603.23562.authors: Seungju Han, Konwoo Kim, Chanwoo Park, Benjamin Newman, Suhas Kotha, Jaehun Jung, James Zou, Yejin Choi
